visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit indoor kitchen. A young man with brown hair, wearing a grey long-sleeved shirt with black and white striped sleeves, holds a yellow-backed desk calendar. He looks directly at the camera with an animated expression. A woman in a grey sweatshirt stands beside him, smiling. (2) The man begins flipping through the calendar pages, revealing various high-quality photographs of himself in different outfits and poses. The woman watches and reacts with laughter, occasionally pointing at the images. (3) The camera focuses on the calendar pages as they are turned. Photos include the man in a black hoodie, a white casual shirt outdoors, and him standing next to an arcade machine. The background consists of white subway tiles and light wood cabinets. (4) The man points his finger toward the camera while speaking excitedly. Several identical calendars are stacked on the white countertop in the foreground. The lighting is consistent and bright studio-style. (5) The man shows a specific page of the calendar featuring him in a sports jersey singing into a microphone. Large text overlays remain static at the top of the frame throughout the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 嘎哥2025桌曆 抽40本. [Slogan]: 快到ApplePodcast留五星好評。留言參加抽獎. (2) [Subtitle]: 來啦 不囉嗦啦 大致敲碗要嘎哥的桌曆 2025年的桌曆來啦 做完送你啦. (3) [Subtitle]: 很多人要啦 終於來啦 嘿啦 不囉嗦啦 很多人敲碗 誰 很多 很多 超多的 有沒有. (4) [Subtitle]: 那因為現在已經2月了嘛 所以我會從2025年的2月 到2026年的1月 哦 蠻貼心的 喔 蠻貼心的. (5) [Subtitle]: 全部只有嘎哥 Only嘎哥哦 有夠嘎哥哦 沒有 就是嘎哥 只有嘎哥. (6) [Subtitle]: 每一月最帥氣的嘎哥陪伴你工作 陪伴你唸書 好不好 不囉嗦啦 回饋一下我們543這群聽眾朋友們. (7) [Subtitle]: 來 趕快到ApplePodcast留下五星好評 啊 留言隨便啦 要誇獎要怕三小 都可以. (8) [Subtitle]: 有義務爭一下 記得留下你的IG帳號 我們會抽40位 應該不會不到40個吧. (9) [Subtitle]: 我覺得有可能 會爆 會爆啦 喔 不要太多人留言 就直接爆掉. (10) [Subtitle]: 哎 好了 趕快去留言啦 Only嘎哥哦 帥的嘎哥 來 40位

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting a product, 1 female guest reacting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian man with brown hair wearing a grey and black striped long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean kitchen with white tiled walls, light-colored wooden cabinets, and a white countertop with several calendars.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-energy male voice speaking Traditional Chinese at an accelerated pace. He has a slightly high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. A cheerful acoustic BGM featuring rhythmic guitar strumming and bright piano notes plays in the background at a moderate volume. (2) A woman's high-arousal laughter interjects, blending with the man's continuous energetic narration. There is no significant ambient noise, keeping the focus entirely on the vocals. (3) Distinctive mid-frequency rustling sounds occur periodically as paper pages are flipped, creating a tactile acoustic texture. The BGM remains steady and upbeat throughout. (4) The male speaker's pitch variability increases as he emphasizes specific dates and promotional details, maintaining a comedic and persuasive delivery. (5) The sequence concludes with a final energetic shout from the man, while the music maintains its tempo before a sharp final cut. The overall mix is clean with clear vocal articulation and a dominant speech layer.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase -> Rule Explanation -> Final CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional giveaway announcement for a 2025 calendar featuring the creator. It utilizes a high-energy, comedic vlog style to showcase the product's photos and instructs viewers on how to participate via a podcast review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is directly holding and promoting his own branded merchandise (a 2025 calendar) and asking for specific engagement on his podcast platform.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video features a very high vocal arousal and dense information delivery, characteristic of social media influencer content aimed at driving engagement.
